primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Includes recommendations on addressing health disparities and social determinants in CKD care

primary_sources.name: American Society of Nephrology Health Equity Framework
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive framework for addressing racial and ethnic disparities in kidney disease

primary_sources.name: CMS ESRD Treatment Choices Model Health Equity Plan
primary_sources.relevance: Federal initiative to reduce disparities in ESRD care and improve equity in treatment options

primary_sources.name: Health Disparities in Kidney Disease: A Scientific Statement from the American Heart Association
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based review of social determinants and strategies for reducing kidney disease disparities

secondary_sources.name: National Kidney Foundation Health Equity Toolkit
secondary_sources.relevance: Practical resources for implementing culturally competent nephrology care

gaps: Limited formal guidelines specifically addressing diversity in nephrology clinical trial design
Emerging research on telehealth equity in nephrology care post-COVID-19
